title: Winter Sale!
excerpt: Happy Holidays, friends! The Winter Sale is here and it’s our biggest one this year; everything’s on sale! For a limited time through December 28, 2020, you can get some great deals on Amy Tangerine courses, digital prints and physical…
body:
Happy Holidays, friends! The Winter Sale is here and it’s our biggest one this year; everything’s on sale! For a limited time through December 28, 2020, you can get some great deals on Amy Tangerine courses, digital prints and physical products! Check out some of these great offers!

Save over 50% percent on the price of each individual course with this 3 Course Bundle! It’s like getting 3 of my courses for the price of 1! Included in this bundle is my newest course - Fresh Takes on Traveler’s Notebooks (reg. $49) - along with A Modern Take on Brush Lettering (reg. $29) and Your Brightest Year Yet (reg. $89). Get all 3 for just $79!

If you’ve already purchased one of the courses, individual courses are also on sale for 20% off with code WINTER.

Mini-Kits and my most-loved travel watercolor kit are also on sale! Save 10% off with code WINTER.

Digital prints are on sale for 50% off! Print them on your computer and pop them in a frame and these would make a perfect easy, last-minute Christmas gift!

Last day for sale pricing and coupons is December 28, 2020!
